title: eleocharis squamata
intro: Eleocharis squamata, also known as the rough-leaved spike-rush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Eleocharis squamata include its ability to treat fever, respiratory issues, and digestive problems, making it a valued herbal remedy. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
